claim: Deep agents enable parallel sub-agents for isolated multi-step tasks, keeping main agent context clean while specializing work
actionable: When building complex research agents, spawn parallel sub-agents for isolated problems; let them report clean summaries to the main agent
source_title: Building a Typescript deep research agent

claim: Sub-agents can clean up messy web search results and return only essential information to the main agent, reducing noise in reasoning
actionable: Use sub-agents as filters: have them clean and summarize noisy external data before feeding it to orchestrating agents
source_title: Building a Typescript deep research agent

claim: Deep agents have file system access to use as scratch pads; sub-agents can read files written by main agent for critique and refinement
actionable: Use shared file systems in multi-agent systems as coordination points; let agents read/write to versioned documents for collaboration
source_title: Building a Typescript deep research agent

claim: Deep agents can write structured to-do lists and self-correct by identifying and filling missing context gaps autonomously
actionable: Have agents write explicit to-do lists early; let them identify missing information and autonomously trigger research to fill gaps
source_title: Building a Typescript deep research agent
